title: Walkabout Mini Golf VR
description:
PRESS"Everyone with a Quest needs to play it" - TechRadar

"An adorable mini-golf game that is unexpectedly convincing" - New York Times

"Brilliantly designed...seriously, you have no idea how good VR mini-golf is" - CNET 

"A magnificent collection of challenging holes set in fantasy locations" - The Washington Post 

GAMEPLAYWalkabout Mini Golf takes everything you love about the real-life game and makes it better. Putting is easy and natural, the physics are completely realistic, and a wide variety of courses provide the perfect challenge for hardcore golfers and casual players alike. 

COURSESEach 18-hole course is carefully crafted to replicate the feeling of classic mini golf in a larger-than-life location. Interconnected holes encourage you to explore the entire course, search for lost balls and try out your own trick shots using anything and everything in the environment. 

⠀

HARD MODEOnce you master a course, you're only halfway there! Hard Mode isn't just cosmetic, every hole has been modified, and sometimes completely redesigned to provide an entirely new course. In the redesigned courses, there will be difficult challenges, a Foxhunt leading you to a specialized putter, and a completely different aesthetic than the standard version of the courses.

MULTIPLAYERWalkabout Mini Golf is better with friends! Full crossplay lets up to 8 players join a private room with voice chat no matter what platform they're playing on (some limits to Pocket Edition do apply). Join our Discord for regular tournaments, or host your own by simply entering the same room name as anyone you want to play with!

FEATURES• 14 unique 18-hole courses to master (plus additional DLC courses available). 

• Unlock Hard Mode for more challenging versions of all courses.

• Play solo, a 1v1 online Quick Match, or create a private room with up to 8 players.

• Play DLC courses with those who own them for free with GUEST PASS.

• Extremely accurate physics that feel just like the real thing.

• Over 250 collectible golf balls hidden throughout the courses (plus more in additional DLC courses). 

• Support for Teleport and Smooth locomotion, as well as the ability to fly.

• Hone your skills with a driving range, practice green and other features.

• Unlockable commemorative putters for each course through Foxhunts on Hard Mode.

• Customizable avatars featuring lip sync and over a QUADRILLION combinations.

• Full crossplay between all VR platforms.

• Supports English, French, Spanish, German, Japanese, Korean and Chinese.
description_short: Escape into a fun and beautiful world filled with the best mini golf courses you’ve ever seen! Play by yourself, meet someone new, or challenge your friends in a private game with up to 8 people. Extremely realistic physics create the perfect experience for hardcore golfers and casual players alike.
